subtitle: Santiago and Valparaíso
intro: A slower five-day route combining neighbourhood walks, independent food, local design and coastal viewpoints, with practical alternatives when plans need to change.
routeOverview: Begin with connected Santiago neighbourhoods, travel to the coast after the morning rush, then explore Valparaíso hillside by hillside. Fixed transfers anchor the route; cultural, food and viewpoint stops remain flexible around energy and conditions.

preparationChecklist.label: Confirm travel insurance and entry requirements
Recheck fixed bookings and time-sensitive places
Open every companion section once while online

packingChecklist.label: Comfortable shoes with grip for steep streets

days.summary: Settle in, understand the immediate area and begin with an unhurried evening.
days.routeLogic: Stay close to Lastarria after arrival. Both activities are walkable from the demonstration accommodation, avoiding another cross-city transfer.

activities.title: Arrival and neighbourhood orientation
activities.description: Check in, confirm tomorrow’s transport options and take a short orientation walk around your accommodation area.
activities.practicalNote: Keep the first afternoon deliberately light after travel.

activities.title: Lastarria evening walk
activities.description: Explore a compact cultural district at a gentle pace, noting galleries, bookshops and places to return to later.
activities.practicalNote: Finish on a well-lit route close to the accommodation.
activities.alternative: If arrival is delayed, shorten this to one block around Plaza Mulato Gil.

days.summary: A full day grouped by neighbourhood to reduce unnecessary travel.
days.routeLogic: Move gradually north and east through central Santiago, leaving the viewpoint until late afternoon for softer light and avoiding backtracking.

activities.title: Independent breakfast and market context
activities.description: Begin with a locally owned café, then walk through a nearby market area to understand everyday food culture rather than treating the market as a checklist stop.
activities.practicalNote: Choose a verified venue from the approved place list.

activities.title: Museum or design-space choice
activities.description: Choose one focused cultural visit according to your energy and interests. Keep the other as a weather-proof alternative.
activities.practicalNote: Typical opening patterns only—confirm on the official website.
activities.alternative: Use Centro Cultural La Moneda as the rainy-day substitution.

activities.title: Late-afternoon city viewpoint
activities.description: Reach a viewpoint before the evening rush, allowing time for changing light rather than a rushed photo stop.
activities.practicalNote: Check access, weather and descent options before setting out.
activities.alternative: Use Cerro Santa Lucía for a shorter, more central viewpoint.

days.theme: Travel to the coast and explore by hillside
days.summary: Travel in the morning and organise the afternoon around one connected hillside area.
days.routeLogic: Use the confirmed intercity transfer, leave luggage, then keep the afternoon entirely within Cerro Alegre and Concepción.

activities.title: Transfer to Valparaíso
activities.description: Use the confirmed intercity connection and keep the booking reference available offline. Allow extra time between arrival and the first planned activity.
activities.practicalNote: Confirm the Santiago departure terminal and Valparaíso arrival point.

activities.title: Cerro Alegre and Concepción walking route
activities.description: Follow a connected route through hillside streets, small galleries and viewpoints. Avoid trying to cover every mural or funicular in one afternoon.
activities.practicalNote: Steep streets and uneven surfaces; use funiculars or taxis where appropriate.
activities.alternative: Shorten the route around Paseo Yugoslavo if energy or weather changes.
activities.verification: Demo — review route and local conditions

activities.title: Small-plate dinner near your return route
activities.description: Choose a verified independent restaurant close to the route back to your accommodation, rather than crossing the city again at night.
activities.practicalNote: Reserve where required and confirm the safest return route.

days.theme: Port history and a flexible creative afternoon
days.summary: Combine one contextual morning visit with a choice-led afternoon.
days.routeLogic: Start lower in the port district, then return uphill once. The afternoon choice remains near the accommodation and adapts to weather and energy.

activities.title: Port-city context walk
activities.description: Use a short guided or self-guided route to connect the port, migration history and the city’s distinctive urban form.
activities.practicalNote: Use the reviewed route and follow current local safety advice.
activities.verification: Demo — verify route safety and access

activities.title: Choose-your-energy afternoon
activities.description: Select one approved option: a design-focused visit, an extended café stop with sketching, or a second hillside walk.
activities.practicalNote: Make the choice on the day rather than overfilling the itinerary.
activities.alternative: Use the rainy-day cultural centre saved in Explore.

days.summary: Leave room for one meaningful return visit rather than filling every remaining hour.
days.routeLogic: Stay near the accommodation and luggage. Choose one saved place that fits the departure time.

activities.title: Return to your favourite area
activities.description: Use saved places and personal notes to revisit the area that felt most rewarding, then collect luggage and continue your journey.
activities.practicalNote: Work backwards from the confirmed departure time.

places.name: Lastarria orientation route
places.description: A short first-day loop linking accommodation, transport and useful nearby services.
places.practicalNote: Keep this route short after arrival.

places.name: Barrio Lastarria
places.description: A compact cultural district of independent venues, bookshops and evening streets.
places.practicalNote: Best explored slowly rather than as a list of individual pins.

places.name: Central Santiago food context
places.description: A café-and-market pairing selected to introduce everyday city food culture.
places.practicalNote: Final venue must be confirmed from the approved database.

places.name: Focused museum choice
places.description: One meaningful design or cultural visit, chosen around current exhibitions and energy.
places.practicalNote: Confirm exhibition, admission and typical opening pattern.

places.name: Cerro San Cristóbal viewpoint
places.description: A broad city-and-mountain outlook timed for late-afternoon light.
places.practicalNote: Confirm access and descent arrangements before visiting.

places.name: Cerro Santa Lucía
places.description: A shorter central viewpoint alternative when time or energy is limited.
places.practicalNote: Steps and uneven surfaces; check current access points.
places.bestFor: A shorter viewpoint closer to the centre.

places.name: Centro Cultural La Moneda
places.description: A central weather-proof cultural option with changing exhibitions.
places.practicalNote: Check the official programme and admission before visiting.
places.bestFor: Rain or a preference for a central indoor visit.

places.name: Santiago–Valparaíso transfer
places.description: The confirmed transfer linking the city and coast sections of the journey.
places.practicalNote: Terminal and operator must be reconfirmed before departure.

places.name: Cerro Alegre and Concepción
places.description: A connected hillside route through local streets, galleries and layered viewpoints.
places.practicalNote: Steep and uneven; shorten or use transport when needed.

places.name: Cerro Alegre independent dinner
places.description: A verified independent dinner option placed on the safe return route.
places.practicalNote: Select the final venue and reserve if required.

places.name: Valparaíso port context route
places.description: A focused route connecting port history, migration and urban form.
places.practicalNote: Use the reviewed route and current local guidance.

places.name: Creative Valparaíso choice
places.description: A choice-led afternoon of design, a slower café stop or a connected walk.
places.practicalNote: Choose one option on the day; do not try to combine all three.

places.name: Rainy-day cultural stop
places.description: An approved indoor alternative for a wet or low-energy afternoon.
places.practicalNote: Final venue depends on the verified current programme.
places.bestFor: Rain, fatigue or a preference for an indoor visit.

places.name: Traveller’s return choice
places.description: A final-morning slot reserved for the place the traveller most wants to revisit.
places.practicalNote: Stay within easy reach of luggage and onward transport.

map.title: Santiago to Valparaíso
map.summary: Two connected city bases, one confirmed intercity transfer and neighbourhood-led daily routes.

practicalInfo.title: Transport
items: Use stored journey times as planning guidance only; confirm the final operator and timetable.
Keep the intercity booking reference available offline.
Avoid unnecessary cross-city transfers by following the route order.

practicalInfo.title: Access and pace
items: Valparaíso includes steep streets, steps and uneven surfaces.
Use the approved shorter routes, funiculars or taxis when energy or mobility requires it.
Accessibility tags describe planning suitability, not a guarantee of step-free access.

practicalInfo.title: Currency notes
items: The planning budget uses Chilean pesos (CLP).
Keep a payment backup and a modest amount of local cash.
Confirm current exchange rates and card fees independently.

practicalInfo.title: Offline use
items: Open every companion section once while connected.
Saved places, checklists and notes remain on this device.
External maps and websites require a connection unless separately downloaded.

emergencyInfo: Chile general emergency numbers and official travel advice must be verified before this demonstration becomes a customer journey.
Keep accommodation addresses and insurer contact details available offline.
Do not store passport scans, medical records or payment information in this companion.
